summary: PUNTO 1 Roadmap - Panel Avanzado de Agentes E2E Testing Complete. 83 tests passed (1 skipped). All 11 agents correctly displayed with tools array. Pause/activate, timeline, config, metrics, pending-approvals, and scheduled-tasks endpoints all working. Master/admin role enforcement verified (403 for tecnico). UI verified with Playwright.

issues: Minor: WebSocket connection warning in console (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/agents/panel/overview returns 11 agents with tools array (not just tools_count) - VERIFIED
POST /api/agents/{id}/pause and /activate require master/admin role (403 for tecnico) - VERIFIED
GET /api/agents/{id}/timeline supports filters: tool, resultado=ok|error|all, desde/hasta, limit - VERIFIED
GET /api/agents/{id}/config returns system_prompt_default, system_prompt_effective, system_prompt_override, rate_limit_soft, rate_limit_hard, history, scopes, tools - VERIFIED
POST /api/agents/{id}/config validates hard >= soft (400 if not), creates audit_log entry with tool='_config_update' - VERIFIED
GET /api/agents/panel/metrics?days=N returns por_agente, top_tools, por_dia, top_errors (days 1-30) - VERIFIED
GET /api/agents/panel/pending-approvals returns items with estado=pendiente - VERIFIED
POST /api/agents/panel/pending-approvals/{id}/decide requires master/admin, accepts aprobar|rechazar|modificar - VERIFIED
GET /api/agents/scheduled-tasks?agent_id=X filters tasks by agent - VERIFIED
UI: 11 agent cards displayed with Pausar/Hablar/Detalle buttons - VERIFIED
UI: Detail sheet has 5 tabs (¿Qué hace?, Actividad, Tareas, Config, Cola) - VERIFIED
UI: Wizard shows 9 use cases for different agents - VERIFIED
UI: TareasTab shows ACTIVA/PAUSADA badge and Pausar/Activar buttons - VERIFIED
UI: ConfigTab shows rate limits inputs and system prompt with Editar prompt button - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Panel Avanzado de Agentes fully tested. 11 agents (8 legacy + 3 Fase 4). All endpoints working: overview, pause/activate, timeline, config, metrics, pending-approvals, scheduled-tasks. Role enforcement working (master/admin only for write operations). UI verified with Playwright - all tabs, buttons, and wizard working correctly.

skipped_tests.reason: No catálogo de referencia (es_catalogo_referencia=True) in revix_preview DB
